Class BaseWeapon

java.lang.Object
logic.base.BaseItem
logic.base.BaseWeapon
All Implemented Interfaces:
Craftable, Equipable
Direct Known Subclasses:
HardstoneSword, IronSword, MithrilSword, PlatinumSword, StoneSword, VibraniumSword, WoodenSword
public abstract class BaseWeapon extends BaseItem implements Craftable, Equipable
Abstract base class for all weapons. Weapons are non-stackable, craftable, and equipable items that increase the player's attack damage.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    BaseWeapon(String name, int dmg, double cd, int craftingPrice)
    Creates a new weapon with the given stats.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseWeapon

      public BaseWeapon(String name, int dmg, double cd, int craftingPrice)
      Creates a new weapon with the given stats.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the weapon
      dmg - the damage bonus granted when equipped
      cd - the cooldown in seconds (must be ≥ 0)
      craftingPrice - the gold cost to craft this weapon

  • Method Details

    • canCraft

      public boolean canCraft(Player p)
      Checks whether the player has enough gold and materials to craft this weapon.
      Specified by:
      canCraft in interface Craftable
      Parameters:
      p - the player attempting to craft
      Returns:
      true if all requirements are met

    • equip

      public void equip(Player p)
      Applies this weapon's damage bonus to the player's attack stat.
      Specified by:
      equip in interface Equipable
      Parameters:
      p - the player equipping this weapon

    • unequip

      public void unequip(Player p)
      Removes this weapon's damage bonus from the player's attack stat.
      Specified by:
      unequip in interface Equipable
      Parameters:
      p - the player unequipping this weapon

    • craft

      public void craft(Player p)
      Crafts this weapon by consuming the required materials and gold from the player. Does nothing if canCraft(Player) returns false.
      Specified by:
      craft in interface Craftable
      Parameters:
      p - the player crafting this weapon

    • getCraftingPrice

      public int getCraftingPrice()
      Returns the gold cost to craft this weapon.
      Specified by:
      getCraftingPrice in interface Craftable
      Returns:
      crafting price in gold

    • setCraftingPrice

      public void setCraftingPrice(int v)
      Sets the crafting price.
      Parameters:
      v - the new crafting price

    • getDmg

      public int getDmg()
      Returns the damage bonus granted by this weapon.
      Returns:
      damage value

    • setDmg

      public void setDmg(int v)
      Sets the damage value. Minimum value is 1.
      Parameters:
      v - the new damage value

    • getCd

      public double getCd()
      Returns the cooldown of this weapon in seconds.
      Returns:
      cooldown in seconds

    • setCd

      public void setCd(double v)
      Sets the cooldown. Minimum value is 0.
      Parameters:
      v - the new cooldown
